rationale: Per-job subagent token accounting. Tracking began after the cost-discipline lesson (see memory/feedback_cost_discipline_model_routing.md) — three failed v0.3.15 workflow attempts burned ~1.4M subagent tokens with zero applied output, prompting the model-routing + orchestrator-direct discipline.

fields.job_id: Job ID per AGENTS.md naming convention
fields.description: One-sentence summary of what the job did
fields.model: Frontier model the specialist subagent ran on (opus / sonnet / haiku), per the model-routing rule in feedback_cost_discipline_model_routing.md
fields.subagent_tokens: Token count consumed by the specialist subagent for this job (does NOT include orchestrator-side tokens, audit closeout, or commit operations)

entries.description: Extended Appendix D.6 PipelineStepSummary with progress_percent/error_code/error_message and added AtomicToolMetadata model with 4-class TTL Literal for FunctionTool registration; 91 → 131 contracts tests green; closes OQ-W-26 from sprint-05.

Provisioned gs://grace-2-hazard-prod-cache GCS bucket via OpenTofu with 4 Object Lifecycle Management rules per FR-DC-5 TTL classes and bucket-scoped objectAdmin IAM for agent-runtime and pyqgis-worker-runtime SAs; customTime round-trip verified live.

Landed services/agent/src/grace2_agent/tools/ package — registry decorator + TOOL_REGISTRY, FR-DC-3 cache shim (compute_cache_key sha256[:32], read_through with live-no-cache short-circuit + force_refresh), and mongo_query/qgis_process pass-through stubs awaiting DI binding; 24 unit tests green.

Landed 4 data-fetch atomic tools (fetch_dem via py3dep/rioxarray, fetch_buildings via MS Planetary Computer STAC, fetch_population via US Census ACS B01003, geocode_location via Nominatim) routing through cache shim with per-source bbox quantization; bound set_mcp_client DI seam; surfaced critical OQ-33-CACHE-CUSTOMTIME-TYPE-BUG (google.cloud.storage rejects str on blob.custom_time — orchestrator hotfixed 2 lines post-commit).

Landed 2 QGIS discovery atomic tools (list_qgis_algorithms enumerated 361 algorithms live at 3.03s + describe_qgis_algorithm parsed 5 zonalstatistics parameters at 1.44s); bound set_worker_submitter DI seam via subprocess Option B' for M4 demo enablement; Cloud Run Jobs v2 submitter follow-up routed.

Landed PipelineEmitter with 6 transition methods + replace-not-reconcile (A.7) structurally enforced (no merge helper exists; test-guarded) + ErrorCodeRegistry + emit_tool_call wrapper; integrated into server.py tool-call site; captured 13-frame live WS transcript (4 session-state + 9 pipeline-state) demonstrating real agent emission; closes OQ-T-28-SIM-WS-BOUNDARY.

Landed M4 acceptance suite — Fort Myers demo driving real grace2-agent subprocess via /invoke directives, OQ-33 regression test using StrictCustomTimeBlob SDK-fidelity fake, M3 test_pipeline_strip rewritten to drive real agent emission (closes OQ-T-28-SIM-WS-BOUNDARY), make test-m4 opt-in target; demo PASS with 2 honest qualifications (fetch_population qualified at upstream API — Census now requires key; qgis_process legs qualified at M5 workflow composition); 247→250 invocations green; fetch_dem cache write verified live on production GCS with datetime customTime (OQ-33 hotfix end-to-end verified).

OQ-4 HydroMT integration depth research + decision — picked Option A (Full HydroMT via hydromt-sfincs end-to-end) over Partial / Custom Config Builders; caught critical Invariant 7 risk (HydroMT roughness component silently fills unmatched NLCD class integers with defaults — mandated validation gate in build_sfincs_model raising SFINCSSetupError on LULC_MAPPING_MISMATCH); established docs/decisions/ convention (5-section format, ≤300 lines, one file per SRS OQ); concrete inheritance contracts for jobs 0039/0040/0042.

Flipped fetch_population default to WorldPop Tier-1 per Appendix F.1 (ACS opt-in via dataset='acs_2022' preserved); discovered MS Planetary Computer worldpop-100m collection + WorldPop Hub STAC don't exist; pivoted to direct REST + GeoTIFF download; 4 GB 100m product can't be windowed via /vsicurl/ (server returns 200 not 206 for range requests) so substituted 50 MB 1km Aggregated product as practical compromise; live Fort Myers fetch verified end-to-end (78.7s wall-clock, COG at GCS with datetime customTime); 72/72 agent tests green; 8 OQ-37-* surfaced + OQ-36 carry-forward.

SFINCS solver substrate landed live and end-to-end-verified: gs://grace-2-hazard-prod-runs bucket (UBA + PAP enforced + versioning ON; deliberate to protect solver outputs) + Cloud Run Job grace-2-sfincs-solver pinned at @sha256:89ce6e27 (thin layer over deltares/sfincs-cpu:sfincs-v2.3.3) + Cloud Workflows grace-2-sfincs-orchestrator + sfincs-runtime/workflow-invoker-sfincs SAs (sfincs-runtime ZERO project-level grants; workflow-invoker has 2 non-storage project grants required by Cloud Logging + Cloud Run LRO API, honestly disclosed); smoke run end-to-end via Workflow execution → Cloud Run Job execution → typed error envelope (exit 2 expected for no model deck); two false-start Dockerfile builds (PEP-668 + binary path) diagnosed + resolved; 23 evidence files; 5 OQs surfaced including OQ-INFRA-40-WORKFLOW-INVOKER-SCOPE.

3 new fetcher atomic tools — fetch_landcover (NLCD WMS GetMap; LIVE-VERIFIED Tier 2 not kickoff-inferred Tier 3 since MRLC direct mirror returns 42-byte placeholder stub; NLCD vintage year sidecar per OQ-4 Invariant 7 mitigation) + fetch_river_geometry (NHDPlus HR HUC4-scoped Tier 4 region download + bbox clip → FlatGeobuf 567 features) + lookup_precip_return_period (NOAA Atlas 14 PFDS Tier 3; 12.1 inches 100-yr 24-hr at Fort Myers); 22 new tests + 104/104 agent suite green; 13 tools registered on startup; 7 OQ-39-* surfaced; 9 evidence files. Commit ea70c1d (misfiled under job-0041 attribution due to concurrent git-add race; files are correctly job-0039's).

run_solver + wait_for_completion atomic tools — Cloud Workflows submission against grace-2-sfincs-orchestrator (job-0040 substrate); progress emission via job-0035 PipelineEmitter.update_progress (36 emissions captured on ~3min smoke run, linear-in-wallclock curve clamped ≤95%); FR-DC-6 uncacheable; EmitterBinding DI seam mirrors job-0032 set_mcp_client pattern; Invariant 8 cancel chain verified live end-to-end at 850 ms (35× under NFR-R-3 30s budget); RunResult correctly maps completion.json error to A.6 error code; 10 new tests + 104/104 agent suite; 7 OQ-41-* surfaced including OQ-41-COMPUTE-CLASS-NAMING (FR-CE-3 medium↔schema standard alias). Commit c7ce917.

M5 capstone composition — new workflows/ package per Decision G; model_flood_scenario composes geocode → fetch_dem → fetch_landcover → fetch_river_geometry → lookup_precip_return_period → build_sfincs_model (with NLCD validation gate per OQ-4 Invariant 7 mitigation) → run_solver → wait_for_completion → postprocess_flood → AssessmentEnvelope Flood subtype; run_model_flood_scenario atomic-tool wrapper; manning_mapping.csv v1.0.0 (20 canonical L48 classes, 4-source citation bundle). **NLCD validation gate FIRED LIVE on real production data — caught MRLC WMS palette-encoding silent-wrong-answer mode** (raster bytes are palette indices [1,3,4,5,6,7,9,10,11,13,14,18,20,21] not canonical NLCD integers); workflow returned typed failed envelope with solver_version='failed:LULC_MAPPING_MISMATCH' instead of producing silently-wrong flood maps. Real Cloud Workflows execution afd364bd through grace-2-sfincs-orchestrator succeeded (synthetic-manifest expected SOLVER_FAILED). 11 new tests + 115/115 agent suite; 14 tools registered. Closes OQ-36-QGIS-PROCESS-DEMO-CHAIN. 9 OQ-42-* incl. critical OQ-42-NLCD-WMS-PALETTE-ENCODING routed to job-0044 hotfix. Commit cca57bd.

Mid-sprint hotfix for OQ-42-NLCD-WMS-PALETTE-ENCODING. Path B (MRLC WCS 1.0.0 GetCoverage) chosen over Path A (WMS palette ColorTable decode) and Path C (forked variant) — server-side canonical bytes eliminates a future Invariant 7 risk that Path A's client-side RGB→class lookup would introduce if MRLC reorders palette legend. WCS 1.0.0 over 2.0.1 (GeoServer EPSG:3857 projection bug) over 1.1.1 (sub-pixel rejection on small bbox); multi-version live verification before pinning. Re-ran job-0042 model_flood_scenario smoke end-to-end: validation gate PASS (fetched [11,21,22,23,24,31,41,42,43,52,71,81,90,95] ⊂ manning_mapping.csv v1.0.0 20 classes); real Cloud Workflows execution 1d98f3e9 dispatched; wait_for_completion polled ~4 min; SOLVER_FAILED on synthetic manifest (same outcome class as job-0040/0042 — not introduced here). HydroMT deck generation is honest next blocker, scoped to job-0043. 4 new tests + 119/119 agent suite; 14 tools registered. Closes OQ-42-NLCD-WMS-PALETTE-ENCODING. Commit 53e2f05.

M5 acceptance — Hurricane Ian/Fort Myers demo end-to-end on deployed substrate. HONEST FAILURE per kickoff §1 substrate-verification criterion: full chain runs through 5 live fetcher cache hits + **Invariant 7 NLCD validation gate PASS branch verified LIVE on canonical WCS bytes** (sister branch to job-0042's FAIL — gate fired BOTH branches in production this sprint; sprint-7 headline win) + NOAA Atlas 14 11.9-inch 100-yr 24-hr forcing for Fort Myers + chain terminates at build_sfincs_model HYDROMT_UNAVAILABLE (hydromt-sfincs not in dev venv; production SFINCS container has it). AssessmentEnvelope returned with typed failure + 5 cited data sources. **Three screenshots captured + surfaced to user via SendUserFile proactive** (baseline + mid_run with progress emissions + final_honest_failure with typed error visible). **Invariant 8 cancel chain measured 8.24 s on full workflow** (3.6× under NFR-R-3 30s budget; combined with job-0041's 850 ms run_solver baseline = both Invariant 8 measurements verified live). NFR-P-4 honestly qualified (substrate only; real SFINCS pends OQ-43-HYDROMT-SFINCS-DEV-VENV-INSTALL). 301 unique-function invocations green across 7 test tiers (largest in project history). 7 OQ-43-* surfaced. Sprint-07 retrospective drafted. Commit 448fd1b.

FR-FR-3 MAX_TURNS_PER_SESSION=25 env-var-overridable cap; SessionStateStatus widening (active|max_turns_reached); counter per WS connection + closing message + status flip on cap. 11 new tests + 130/130 agent suite. Scope crept into job-0045 territory (also added 4 §F.1.2 + §3.10 envelope payload classes to ws.py); concurrent job-0045 reconciled with test factories. OQ-48-PARALLEL-SCHEMA-FILE-OWNERSHIP filed. First sprint-08 Sonnet model-routing win. Commit 1c6537a.

hydromt-sfincs install in agent service. Honest pin correction: OQ-4 §4 paper pin hydromt-sfincs>=1.1.2 doesn't exist on PyPI (sequence 1.1.0→1.2.0); corrected to >=1.1.0,<2.0 (resolved 1.2.2 + hydromt 0.10.1). M5 chain advances past HYDROMT_UNAVAILABLE: fetchers cache-hit + Invariant 7 gate PASS again + Atlas 14 forcing loads + HydroMT-SFINCS initialises + new honest blocker HYDROMT_BUILD_FAILED at sfincs_builder.py:692 (raw YAML string to .build(opt=...); 1.2.x expects dict). One-line engine fix surfaced as OQ-49-HYDROMT-BUILD-OPT-ARGUMENT-SHAPE → job-0052 hotfix. infra/THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md NEW. Closes OQ-43-HYDROMT-SFINCS-DEV-VENV-INSTALL. Commit b314153.

Mode 1 catalog schema substrate — CatalogEntry pydantic rewritten to §F.1.2 binding shape (id/name/description/urls/access_tier 1-4/credential_tier 1-3/ttl_class/source_class/license/citation/vintage/last_verified/status/how_to_use/api_key_secret_ref + model_validator credential consistency). D.11 catalog_entries + D.12 catalog_audit_log Mongo collections with FR-MP-5-aligned indexes (D.11/D.12 numbering vs kickoff's D.8/D.9 — live-verification of existing D.7-D.10 meta sections; OQ-45-D-NUMBERING). 4 envelopes registered in CLIENT_TO_AGENT_PAYLOADS/AGENT_TO_CLIENT_PAYLOADS routing dicts (payload classes themselves added by concurrent job-0048's scope creep — clean concurrent reconciliation). 11 new tests + 142/142 contracts green. 6 new JSON Schemas exported idempotently. SRS A + D extensions; make srs idempotent. 7 OQ-45-* surfaced. Commit 3c66ab2.

Mid-sprint hotfix #1: yaml.safe_load fix at sfincs_builder.py:692. M5 chain advances meaningfully (11.47s → 41.11s execution; HydroMT actually runs setup_grid_from_region + setup_dep DEM IDW on 96 cells + setup_mask_active). Next honest blocker: setup_manning_roughness rejects map_fn kwarg in hydromt-sfincs 1.2.x. Substrate-integrity guard worked — TypeError caught + typed as SFINCSSetupError per FR-FR-2 routing. +2 tests + 132/132 agent suite. Closes OQ-49-HYDROMT-BUILD-OPT-ARGUMENT-SHAPE; OQ-52 routed to job-0053. Commit 1b7bf88.

Catalog seed research — public_data_source_catalog.yaml v0.1.0 with 30 vetted entries across all 8 domains (terrain 4, hydrology 5, weather/precip 4, buildings 4, population 3, landcover 3, fire 4, seismic 3). 21 distinct source_class values (finer than the 8 high-level domains; correct per FR-DC-1). **9 access-tier deviations from documentation caught via live probe** — NEXRAD bucket renamed Sep 2025, FEMA NFHL URL moved, USGS 3DEP subdomain change, USFS WHP ArcGIS 403 → Tier 4 FSRDA fallback, LANDFIRE WCS workspaces unconfirmed, WorldPop Tier 4 re-confirmed, MRMS subdomain change, FEMA NRI endpoint deferred to sprint-09, CO-OPS permanent redirect. 4 domain gaps disclosed honestly in footer (not padded). Sonnet routing validated: 142,889 tokens at 63% of sprint-7 Opus average; without live probe, catalog would have shipped with 9 stale URLs requiring sprint-09 hotfix cascades. Commit 3aa394e.

Mid-sprint hotfix #2: setup_manning_roughness v1.2.x kwarg fix via live `inspect.signature(model.setup_manning_roughness)` — closes OQ-52-MANNING-ROUGHNESS-MAP-FN-MISMATCH. Reshape reclass_table into datasets_rgh entries; new _write_hydromt_reclass_table_csv helper. M5 chain advances setup_grid_from_region → setup_dep → setup_mask_active → setup_manning_roughness CLEAR; fails at setup_river_inflow with merit_hydro DataCatalog not loaded — **NEW CLASS of mismatch** (DataCatalog binding vs signature kwarg). Three consecutive 1.2.x mismatches confirms systematic migration need; ESCALATION RULE FIRES → comprehensive 1.2.x API-migration audit (job-0054) rather than 4th hotfix. +1 test + 133/133 agent suite. Commit a6399d2.

Comprehensive hydromt-sfincs 1.2.x API-migration audit (escalation from 0049/0052/0053 hotfix chain). Live-inspected every setup_* method's 1.2.2 signature, cross-walked to library source. Two material mismatches caught + fixed in one pass: OQ-53 closed (setup_river_inflow: dropped hydrography='merit_hydro' — artifact_data catalog ships Italy-only rasters; rivers FGB carries needed geometry per workflows/flwdir.py:194-197 `if da_uparea is not None:` guard); OQ-54 closed (setup_precip_forcing: replaced invalid precip/duration_hr with v1.2.x-accepted magnitude in mm/hr — Atlas 14 11.9 in/24 hr → 12.59 mm/hr). Expanded canonical docstring with live signatures for every step; added all-steps signature audit test (`test_build_sfincs_model_all_setup_steps_match_live_signatures`) as residual guard against future drift. M5 re-run: PARTIAL SUCCESS / NEW FAILURE CLASS — chain advances through **all 5 setup steps cleanly** (`setup_river_inflow` finds 39 inflow points!) and fails INSIDE hydromt-sfincs 1.2.2 itself at `set_forcing_1d` (sfincs.py:1858) calling `pd.RangeIndex.is_integer()` which was REMOVED in pandas ≥ 2.0 (we run 3.0.3). Upstream library bug, not API mismatch. Surfaced as OQ-54-HYDROMT-SFINCS-PANDAS-3X-INCOMPAT; recommended remediation: drop setup_river_inflow from v0.1 pluvial deck (river inflow is M5+ scope). 3 new tests + 17 in test_model_flood_scenario.py; 157 agent suite passes (2 fails are concurrent job-0047 pre-existing). Chained-hotfix loop broken. Commit bc30638.

Stage B: catalog_search + catalog_fetch atomic tools + generic Tier-2 OGC adapter — the §F.1.2 Mode 1 substrate. tools/ogc_adapter.py exposes fetch_ogc_layer(service_type=WMS|WCS|WFS|ArcGIS-REST, version, image_format, ...) with defensive exception-XML detection (raises OGCAdapterError rather than caching error bodies as raster). WCS 1.0.0 sweet spot preserves job-0044's MRLC fix; direct `requests` over `owslib` for Mode 1 retrieval (OQ-47-OWSLIB-CHOICE). **fetch_landcover refactored** to call into adapter — identical WCS 1.0.0 request shape + cache key + exception wrap; job-0044's pinning test still passes + new revert-prevention test added. **Live catalog_search**: topic=flood zones + Fort Myers bbox → rank-1 fema-nfhl-flood-zones (score 7.0); topic=DEM → Copernicus GLO-30/GLO-90/HydroSHEDS (score 8.0); source_filter=landcover restricts; Africa bbox correctly drops 3DEP via CONUS heuristic. **Live catalog_fetch**: fema-nfhl-flood-zones → 8,045,110 bytes real GeoJSON polygons from hazards.fema.gov; usgs-3dep-elevation → 4,195,622 bytes real GeoTIFF (F32 1024×1024) from elevation.nationalmap.gov. 16 tools at startup verified (14+2). 23 new tests + 159/159 agent + 142/142 contracts. OQ-47-CATALOG-YAML-SECRET-REFS (2 of 30 entries — Census ACS + NASA FIRMS — declare credential_tier:2 but lack api_key_secret_ref; routes to infra Secret Manager + engine curator amendment). Commit 034dfd5.

Mid-sprint follow-up to job-0054 audit rec (b): dropped `setup_river_inflow` from v0.1 pluvial YAML deck. river_local_path kept in signature (still fetched + cached for v0.2+); the block emission removed with 17-line comment block citing v0.1 scope + OQ-54 routing. **Bonus in-scope fix**: SFINCS time format `tref/tstart/tstop` corrected from ISO 8601 (`2026-01-01T00:00:00`) to native (`20260101 000000`) per sfincs_input.py `strptime(val, '%Y%m%d %H%M%S')` parser — discovered live during run. M5 chain advances FURTHER: clears all 4 setup steps + emits `setup_precip_forcing.magnitude: 12.5946...` correctly, then dies INSIDE hydromt-sfincs 1.2.2 at sfincs.py:2456 calling `pd.date_range(..., freq="10T")` — pandas 3.0 removed the "T" minute frequency alias (use "10min"). NEW upstream incompat **OQ-55-PRECIP-FORCING-PANDAS3X-FREQ-ALIAS** (same class as OQ-54's is_integer()). Routing rec: single pandas pin in services/agent/pyproject.toml should unblock BOTH. 17/17 model_flood_scenario tests + 159/159 agent suite. No screenshot moment. Cost: 114,514 tokens (Sonnet — mechanical execution of Opus's audit recommendation, second sprint-8 Sonnet routing win). Commit cf9bfd3.

**Major milestone**: pandas 2.2.3 pinned. Path A (pandas>=2.1,<2.2) failed — Python 3.13 cp313 wheel constraint (pandas 2.1.x has no cp313 wheel; build from source fails on _PyLong_AsByteArray signature change). pandas 2.2.x is earliest with cp313 wheel AND both deprecated APIs still functional (FutureWarnings). One pin closes both OQ-54 (is_integer) + OQ-55 (freq="10T"). **No cascade** — numpy/geopandas/rasterio/xarray/pyproj/shapely all unchanged. 162/162 tests (159 baseline + 3 regression guards in test_pandas_pin_regression.py). **M5 chain advances FAR FURTHER — HydroMT model build completes for the first time in project history**: all setup_* steps green + SFINCS deck (sfincs.inp + DEM + Manning + precip forcing) uploaded to gs://grace-2-hazard-prod-cache/cache/static-30d/sfincs_setup/01KTHQP54XVAAF2NPGKTAMP4PV/ + **Cloud Workflows execution 08370fe0-a31b-4edb-a173-1f77ef3cec77 dispatched + ran ~3.8 minutes** in real solver Cloud Run Job. New honest blocker: **SOLVER_FAILED** on the REAL manifest (prior 0040/0042/0044 SOLVER_FAILED outcomes were on synthetic manifests). Chain is past ALL HydroMT + pandas + setup_* issues. Surfaced as **OQ-56-SFINCS-SOLVER-FAILED-REAL-MANIFEST** — routes to infra (Cloud Run Job container review + execution log inspection) or engine (SFINCS deck completeness validation). Commit ad915bf.

**🎉 M5 PIPELINE SUCCESS — FIRST FLOOD-DEPTH OUTPUT IN PROJECT HISTORY**. Two-part root-cause fix in `_default_setup_uri` + `build_sfincs_model`: (1) URI returns `/manifest.json` (file), not trailing-slash directory; (2) emits worker-contract `manifest.json` with `{inputs:[{gs_uri,dest}], sfincs_args:[], outputs:[...]}` enumerating all 11 deck files. fsspec.upload preserves the `deck/` prefix so manifest gs_uri values are correct. **Live E2E**: worker reads manifest with NO 404 → all 11 inputs downloaded → **SFINCS binary ran 287s + exit 0** → `sfincs_map.nc` produced at gs://grace-2-hazard-prod-runs/01KTHS9C5HH9N15SXQ0KEKKBGX/sfincs_map.nc (38 MB, 527×540 grid @ 30 m, EPSG:32617, **hmax 3.52 m**, 27.4% cells with depth ≥50 cm — plausible pluvial response for 100-yr 24-hr Atlas 14 11.9 in design storm over flat Fort Myers terrain). completion.json status=ok exit_code=0. 2 new manifest tests + 164/164 agent suite. Orchestrator-direct hmax → PNG render surfaced via SendUserFile proactive per memory rule. Remaining trivial follow-up: postprocess_flood COG_WRITE_FAILED on singleton timemax dim → job-0058. Commit 15e7832.

**🎉 PRODUCTION M5 END-TO-END SUCCESS** (sprint-08 capstone deliverable). postprocess_flood squeeze fix: handle HydroMT-SFINCS 1.2.2's hmax shape (timemax=1, n, m) → squeeze to 2D before COG write; raises RUN_OUTPUT_UNEXPECTED_SHAPE if ndim still > 2 after squeeze (defense-in-depth for true multi-time runs). 1 new regression test (synthetic xarray dataset with hmax(1,8,8) → COG write succeeds). 165/165 agent suite. **Live E2E SUCCESS**: AssessmentEnvelope.outcome=SUCCESS; layer_uris=[gs://grace-2-hazard-prod-runs/01KTHTFCV5E588A293N0JFQTZH/flood_depth_peak.tif]; solver_version=sfincs-v2.3.3; flood_max_depth_m=3.515. rasterio verification: 1.4 MiB LZW COG, 527×540 float32 single-band, 284,580 flooded cells. Production PNG render of the COG surfaced to user via SendUserFile proactive (reports/screenshots/job-0058-m5-production-cog.png). New OQ-59-FLOOD-COG-CRS-LABEL-VS-COORDS surfaced: postprocess writes UTM-17N coordinates with EPSG:3857 tag (data correct, label wrong; sprint-9 housekeeping). Commit 49494af.

**Sprint-08 Stage D acceptance + close** (supersedes 0051 reservation). Verified live: (1) Mode 1 catalog substrate — catalog_search returns FEMA NFHL rank-1 for flood-zone topic; catalog_fetch fema-nfhl 7.74 MB GeoJSON live; catalog_fetch 3DEP 4.00 MB GeoTIFF live; 16 tools at startup. (2) FR-FR-3 MAX_TURNS=25 cap fires correctly. (3) **Reproducible PRODUCTION M5 SUCCESS — 3rd live SFINCS run** at gs://grace-2-hazard-prod-runs/01KTJ3PP1JMF96WR4CCZZ4JRYS/flood_depth_peak.tif (527s exit 0, identical hmax 3.515 m, 527×540 grid, 197,404 cells >5cm flooded — chain is mechanically sound, not a one-off). (4) Invariant 7 NLCD gate PASS branch live again. (5) Full regression green. Retrospective: sprint-08 6 jobs planned → 12 delivered; 10% LOWER total tokens than sprint-07 (1,675,748 + this job = 1,786,238 vs sprint-7's 1,863,284) despite delivering substantially more; 6 Sonnet routing wins at 38.9% of tokens. Sprint healthy. Sprint-08 closing screenshot surfaced via SendUserFile (reports/screenshots/sprint-08-close-m5-reproducible-cog.png). Commit 89587c1.

Stage A: OQ-59-FLOOD-COG-CRS-LABEL-VS-COORDS resolved. Diagnosed SFINCS netCDF CRS encoding: `ds["crs"]` data variable carries attrs={"EPSG":"-", "epsg_code":"EPSG:32617"}; ds.attrs has no "crs" key, so the original `.attrs.get("crs", "EPSG:3857")` always returned EPSG:3857 (Web Mercator tag on UTM-17N coords → ~10,000 km misplacement in any GIS that respects the tag). Added `_read_crs_from_dataset(ds)` helper reading CF-convention encodings in order: epsg_code (handles "EPSG:32617" string AND bare int forms) → crs_wkt/spatial_ref via pyproj WKT parse → ds.attrs.get("crs") fallback with warning. BEFORE EPSG:3857; AFTER EPSG:32617. 3 new tests + OQ-58 squeeze guard preserved. 169/170 agent suite (1 pre-existing failure unrelated, from concurrent job-0060 mid-flight). Bug-class scan: no other instances. Commit 0990d1c.

Stage A: IAM grant — qgis-server-runtime SA receives roles/storage.objectViewer on gs://grace-2-hazard-prod-runs/. Single google_storage_bucket_iam_member added to infra/buckets.tf (co-located with existing -qgs/-cog/-fgb viewers). Tofu plan 1-add 0-change 0-destroy; apply clean. **Live WMS smoke verified**: test .qgs referencing /vsigs/grace-2-hazard-prod-runs/01KTHTFCV5E588A293N0JFQTZH/flood_depth_peak.tif → QGIS Server GetMap returned HTTP 200 + 256×256 RGBA PNG (no GDAL permission error). NFR-S-2 preserved (no project-level grant; bucket-scoped only). Infrastructure ready for sprint-09 publish_layer tool (job-0062). NEW carry-forward OQ-61-CLOUD-RUN-SCALING-BLOCK-DRIFT (pre-existing untargeted plan drift, unrelated). Commit 1b2f989.

Stage A: `run_model_flood_scenario` returns `LayerURI | dict` per layer-emission-contract.md. Success path constructs LayerURI from envelope.layers[0]; failure path falls back to envelope.model_dump (preserves structured error info for LLM). PipelineEmitter's isinstance(LayerURI) auto-emit branch at pipeline_emitter.py:517 now fires → add_loaded_layer → session-state.loaded_layers populated (A.7 replace-not-reconcile). 25/25 tests pass. Live session_state_envelope captured: loaded_layers[0].uri == gs://grace-2-hazard-prod-runs/<run_id>/flood_depth_peak.tif, style_preset=continuous_flood_depth, role=primary. (Live M5 smoke hit environmental GCS-creds blocker on landcover read — unrelated to the change.) Sprint-09 Sonnet routing win #3. Stage A COMPLETE (3/3). Commit edfeb06.

historical_context.note: Captured for accountability — NOT counted in totals_by_sprint. These ran BEFORE the cost-discipline rule was in place.

failed_workflows.description: v0.3.15 SRS amendment first attempt — research + synthesis + adversarial verify across 7 subagents, REFUTED with 11 issues, no edits applied.
v0.3.15 SRS amendment second attempt — 3-judge adversarial panel failed at StructuredOutput synthesis (all 3 judges); user interrupted; resumed and re-failed.
Old job-0028 (M3 acceptance) workflow that completed AFTER I had already manually closed job-0028 with a single Agent call — produced duplicate work in inflight dir that was cleaned up.
